items.name: Fire Pump Set
items.overview: PEDJ series fire pump set consists of an Electric pump + Diesel pump + Jockey pump and all accessories. The pressure switch and control cabinet automatically turn the three pumps on/off — the electric pump and jockey pump operate when there is electricity, and the diesel pump activates when the power cuts. Built to the NFPA20 standard.

techFeatures.label: Configuration
techFeatures.value: Electric Pump + Diesel Pump + Jockey Pump

items.name: Upright Sprinkler
items.overview: The upright automatic sprinkler is installed with its deflector above the pipe, directing water downward and outward to distribute it evenly over the protected area. It is intended for use in exposed-pipe systems and areas where pendent installation is impractical, and is listed to UL 199 for use in NFPA 13 wet, dry and preaction systems.

techFeatures.label: Response Type
techFeatures.value: Standard response 5 mm bulb / Quick response 3 mm bulb

techFeatures.label: Temperature Ratings
techFeatures.value: 57 C orange, 68 C red, 79 C yellow, 93 C green, 141 C blue

items.name: Pendent Sprinkler
items.overview: The pendent automatic sprinkler is installed hanging below the branch line so the deflector faces down, spreading water in a hemispherical spray over the floor area. It is the most common sprinkler used with concealed piping below finished ceilings and is UL 199 listed for wet, dry and preaction NFPA 13 systems.

techFeatures.label: Thread Connection
techFeatures.value: 1/2" NPT (15 mm); 3/4" NPT for larger K

techFeatures.label: Response Type
techFeatures.value: Quick response 3 mm bulb / Standard response 5 mm bulb

techFeatures.label: Temperature Ratings
techFeatures.value: 57 C orange, 68 C red, 79 C yellow, 93 C green, 141 C blue

techFeatures.label: Finishes
techFeatures.value: Natural brass, chrome plated, white/black polyester

items.name: Sidewall Sprinkler
items.overview: The horizontal sidewall sprinkler discharges water in a quarter-sphere pattern away from the wall on which it is mounted, allowing protection of rooms and corridors without piping across the ceiling. It is listed to UL 199 for light and ordinary hazard occupancies where ceiling sprinkler layout is impractical.

techFeatures.label: Response Type
techFeatures.value: Quick response 3 mm bulb / Standard response 5 mm bulb

techFeatures.label: Temperature Ratings
techFeatures.value: 68 C red, 79 C yellow, 93 C green, 141 C blue

items.name: Concealed Sprinkler
items.overview: The concealed pendent sprinkler is recessed above the ceiling and hidden by a decorative cover plate that drops away at a preset temperature to expose the sprinkler for operation. It provides a flush, aesthetic ceiling appearance for finished commercial and residential spaces and is UL 199 listed for NFPA 13 wet systems.

techFeatures.label: Cover Plate Release
techFeatures.value: 57 C or 74 C solder, drop-away type

items.name: OS&Y Valve Flanged
items.overview: The APC Industrie Z-300 is a 300 PSI OS&Y gate valve certified by UL/cUL, FM, VDS, CCC, and NSF/ANSI 61 & 372. Built to ANSI/AWWA C515 and ASME B16.10, it features a ductile iron body and EPDM-encapsulated wedge for zero-leakage, bi-directional sealing. With a debris-free, straight-through design, it has passed 5,000+ seat cycling tests. Features like a pre-grooved stainless steel stem and tamper-resistant nuts allow easy switch installation. Every valve is 100% tested for zero-leakage, reliable performance.

techFeatures.label: Flange Standard
techFeatures.value: ASME/ANSI B 16.1 Class 125, ASME/ANSI B 16.42 Class 150, BS EN 1092-2 PN 16, GB / T9113.1

techFeatures.label: Approvals
techFeatures.value: UL, cUL, FM, NSF / ANSI 61 & NSF / ANSI 372, VDS, CCC

techFeatures.label: Body Plug
techFeatures.value: NPT plug on body with 2 operating nuts

techFeatures.label: Lead-Free Certification
techFeatures.value: Certified lead-free by NSF / ANSI 61 & NSF / ANSI 372 is available

materials.name: Flat Washer
materials.standard: Flat Washer / Stainless Steel 304 / ASTM A276

items.name: OS&Y Valve Grooved
items.overview: The APC Resilient Wedge OS&Y (Outside Screw & Yoke) Gate Valve with grooved ends provides positive, visible open/shut indication for fire-protection mains and risers. Its fully encapsulated EPDM-coated ductile iron wedge seals bubble-tight against an unobstructed, epoxy-lined waterway, making it ideal for isolation duty on wet-pipe, dry-pipe and standpipe systems.

techFeatures.label: Valve Type
techFeatures.value: Resilient Wedge OS&Y Gate Valve, Rising Stem

techFeatures.label: Approvals
techFeatures.value: UL, cUL, FM, NSF/ANSI 61 & NSF/ANSI 372 (UL 262, ULC/ORD C262-92, FM 1120/1130)

techFeatures.label: Coating
techFeatures.value: Epoxy coated interior & exterior by electrostatic spray

techFeatures.label: Disc / Wedge Material
techFeatures.value: Ductile Iron fully encapsulated with EPDM

items.name: NRS Valve
items.overview: The APC 300 PSI Resilient Wedge NRS (Non-Rising Stem) Gate Valve, flanged end, is a compact isolation valve for buried and space-restricted fire-protection installations where a rising stem is undesirable. The EPDM-encapsulated ductile iron wedge and epoxy-coated full-bore waterway deliver drip-tight shut-off and low head loss on wet-pipe fire mains.

techFeatures.label: Valve Type
techFeatures.value: Resilient Wedge Gate Valve, Non-Rising Stem (NRS)

techFeatures.label: End Connection / Flange Standard
techFeatures.value: Flanged - ASME B16.1 Cl.125 / B16.42 Cl.150 / BS EN 1092-2 PN16 / GB/T 9113.1

techFeatures.label: Approvals
techFeatures.value: UL, cUL, FM, VdS, CCC, NSF/ANSI 61 & 372 (UL 262, ULC/ORD C262-92, FM 1120/1130)

techFeatures.label: Disc / Wedge Material
techFeatures.value: Ductile Iron fully encapsulated with EPDM

items.name: Check Valve
items.overview: The APC 300 PSI Swing Check Valve with flanged ends prevents reverse flow in fire-protection risers, pump discharge lines and water-supply mains. Its spring-assisted swing disc closes rapidly and smoothly to minimise water-hammer shock, while the epoxy-lined ductile iron body ensures long service life in wet-pipe systems.

techFeatures.label: End Connection / Flange Standard
techFeatures.value: Flanged - ASME B16.1 Cl.125 / B16.42 Cl.150 / BS EN 1092-2 PN16 / GB/T 9113.1

items.name: Check Valve Grooved
items.overview: The APC grooved-end Swing Check Valve is a rapid-response, non-return valve for fire-protection piping using roll-groove couplings. The spring-loaded swing disc reduces water-hammer on closure and the epoxy-coated ductile iron body offers reliable backflow prevention on both supply and drain lines, in horizontal or vertical (upward flow) orientation.

items.name: Butterfly Valve
items.overview: The APC 300 PSI Grooved-End Butterfly Valve with signal gearbox is a compact indicating isolation valve for fire-protection mains, installed before sprinkler heads and up- or downstream of alarm and deluge valves. The EPDM fully-encapsulated ductile iron disc seals bubble-tight, and the worm-gear operator with a factory-installed supervisory tamper switch provides valve-position monitoring to the fire alarm panel.

techFeatures.label: Valve Type
techFeatures.value: Grooved-End Butterfly Valve with signal gearbox & tamper switch

techFeatures.label: Operator
techFeatures.value: Worm-gear operator with handwheel & open/close indicator, integral supervisory (tamper) switch

techFeatures.label: Coating
techFeatures.value: Epoxy coated interior & exterior by electrostatic spray

items.name: Deluge Valve
items.overview: The APC Deluge Valve is a diaphragm-type control valve that holds back the water supply to open (deluge) or pre-action sprinkler and water-spray systems until actuated. On a fire signal from the release circuit the valve trips, allowing full unobstructed flow to every open nozzle simultaneously for high-hazard protection. It is available with UL/FM approval up to 300 PSI in groove, flange or combination end configurations.

techFeatures.label: Valve Type
techFeatures.value: Diaphragm Deluge Valve (deluge / pre-action / water-spray systems)

techFeatures.label: End Connection
techFeatures.value: Groove x Groove, Flange x Groove, or Flange x Flange

techFeatures.label: Flange Standard
techFeatures.value: ASME B16.42 Class 150/300 or DIN 2501 PN16/PN25

materials.name: Valve Body
materials.material: Ductile Iron / CF8 / CF8M / C95400 / C95800

items.name: Wet Alarm Check Valve
items.overview: The APC Wet Alarm Valve (alarm check valve) is the primary control valve of a wet-pipe automatic sprinkler system. It permits water flow into the system, prevents reverse flow, and on operation of a single sprinkler diverts water to a hydraulically operated water-motor gong and/or pressure switch to signal an alarm. The epoxy-coated ductile iron body carries UL/FM approval for reliable wet-pipe service.

techFeatures.label: Valve Type
techFeatures.value: Wet Alarm Check Valve (alarm valve) for wet-pipe sprinkler systems

techFeatures.label: End Connection
techFeatures.value: Flanged (drilled to ASME B16.1 Cl.125 / B16.42 Cl.150)

techFeatures.label: Trim / Accessories
techFeatures.value: Retard chamber, water-motor gong, pressure switch, drain & test connections

items.name: Air Vent
items.overview: The APC Automatic Air Release Valve (air vent) automatically releases trapped air from wet-pipe fire sprinkler systems, helping to mitigate internal pipe corrosion caused by entrapped oxygen as required by NFPA 13. It maintains excellent leak tightness under rated system pressure while venting air during fill and normal operation, and is also suited to horizontal split-case pump installations.

techFeatures.label: Valve Type
techFeatures.value: Automatic Air Release / Air Vent Valve

techFeatures.label: Standards / Approvals
techFeatures.value: Designed, manufactured & tested to UL 2573 / FM 1344

techFeatures.label: Application
techFeatures.value: Wet-pipe sprinkler systems and horizontal split-case pumps

items.name: Flow Switch
items.overview: The vane-type waterflow alarm switch mounts on the sprinkler branch or riser and detects flow of water in the pipe, actuating electrical contacts to signal a fire alarm or supervisory panel. A pneumatic retard element delays the alarm to prevent false signals from pressure surges, and the device is UL/FM listed for use per NFPA 13 and NFPA 72.

items.name: Tamper Switch
items.overview: The valve supervisory (tamper) switch monitors the open position of a control valve such as an OS&Y gate, butterfly or post-indicator valve, sending a supervisory signal when the valve is moved from its normal position. It is UL/FM listed for installation on fire-protection water-supply valves per NFPA 13 and NFPA 72.

techFeatures.label: Actuation Point
techFeatures.value: Within 2 turns or 1/5 travel from open

items.name: Pressure Switch
items.overview: The supervisory pressure switch monitors air or water pressure in dry-pipe, preaction, deluge and pressure-maintenance systems, actuating electrical contacts on a preset rise or fall in pressure to signal alarm or supervisory conditions. It is UL/FM listed for fire-protection service under NFPA 13 and NFPA 72.

techFeatures.label: Pressure Range
techFeatures.value: Adjustable, typically 4-15 psi (supervisory) up to 300 psi service

techFeatures.label: Contact Configuration
techFeatures.value: One or two SPDT (Form C); DPDT optional

items.name: Dry Barrel Hydrant
items.overview: The Dry Barrel Hydrant is an AWWA C502 dry-barrel fire hydrant designed for regions subject to freezing temperatures. The main valve seats below the frost line, and positive-acting drain valves empty the barrel automatically each time the hydrant is closed, preventing water from freezing inside the standpipe. Rugged ductile iron construction and a break-away flange provide reliable, traffic-resistant service.

techFeatures.label: Outlet Threads
techFeatures.value: NH/NST (4.5-4 NH & 2.5-7.5 NH) or to order

techFeatures.label: Coating
techFeatures.value: Red epoxy exterior; bitumen-coated below grade

items.name: Wet Barrel Hydrant
items.overview: The Wet Barrel Hydrant is an AWWA C503 fire hydrant for mild, non-freezing climates where the barrel remains continuously charged with water. Each outlet is fitted with its own independent compression valve, allowing individual nozzles to be operated without shutting the entire hydrant. It is built from high-strength ductile iron with bronze internals for long service life.

techFeatures.label: Outlets
techFeatures.value: 1 x 4-1/2" pumper + 2 x 2-1/2" hose (each independently valved)

techFeatures.label: Stem
techFeatures.value: Blow-out proof silicon bronze or stainless steel

items.name: Wet Barrel Hydrant BS-750
items.overview: The BS 750 Wet Barrel (Pillar) Hydrant is an above-ground pillar fire hydrant conforming to BS 750 / BS EN 14384, supplied in 2-way or 4-way configurations. It features a ductile iron body with brass or gunmetal landing-valve outlets and is typically mounted on an underground sluice (gate) valve, operated by a standard hydrant key and bar. Outlets can be supplied with 2-1/2" instantaneous or round-thread couplings to BS 336.

items.name: Underground Hydrant
items.overview: The Underground Hydrant is a BS 750 sluice-valve-type fire hydrant installed below ground in a hydrant pit and accessed through a surface box. Of the DN80 screw-down / sluice-valve pattern, it is operated with a hydrant key and bar and delivers water through a single 2-1/2" instantaneous or round-thread outlet. Ductile iron construction with gunmetal working parts suits buried municipal and industrial water mains.

techFeatures.label: Operation
techFeatures.value: Hydrant key and bar; anticlockwise open

items.name: Post Indicator
items.overview: The Post Indicator Post (PIP) is an above-ground indicator post used to operate and monitor a buried or otherwise inaccessible gate valve on a fire-protection water main. A target window clearly displays OPEN or SHUT so responders can verify at a glance that the underground valve is fully open. It is UL/ULC Listed and FM Approved for use with resilient-wedge or OS&Y gate valves per NFPA 24.

techFeatures.label: Function
techFeatures.value: Operates buried gate valve; visual OPEN/SHUT indication

techFeatures.label: Post Head & Bell
techFeatures.value: Gray Iron ASTM A126 Class B

techFeatures.label: Adjustment
techFeatures.value: Telescoping barrel for variable bury depth

items.name: Single Fire Hose Cabinet FHC-Class1&2
items.overview: A single-door fire hose cabinet designed to house a Class I and/or Class II standpipe outlet in accordance with NFPA 14. It stores a landing valve, hose rack with rack hose and nozzle, providing a code-compliant, protected point of connection for both fire-brigade and occupant first-aid firefighting use.

techFeatures.label: Typical Contents
techFeatures.value: Landing valve, hose rack, 1.5"/2.5" rack hose, nozzle

techFeatures.label: Typical Size (W x H x D)

items.name: Double Vertical FHC-Class3
items.overview: A double-compartment fire hose cabinet arranged in a vertical (stacked) configuration to serve a Class III standpipe system per NFPA 14, combining both a 2.5" fire-brigade connection and a 1.5" occupant-use hose station. The tall footprint suits corridors and stairwell landings where floor width is limited.

techFeatures.label: Typical Contents
techFeatures.value: Landing valve, hose rack, hose reel, nozzles, extinguisher (optional)

techFeatures.label: Typical Size (W x H x D)

items.name: Double Horizontal
items.overview: A double-compartment fire hose cabinet arranged side-by-side (horizontal) to house a complete Class III standpipe hose station together with a hose reel and/or portable extinguisher. The wide layout gives easy access to all equipment at working height and suits open walls and lobbies.

techFeatures.label: Typical Contents
techFeatures.value: Landing valve, hose rack, hose reel, nozzle, extinguisher

techFeatures.label: Typical Size (W x H x D)

items.name: Extinguisher Cabinet
items.overview: A wall-mounted protective cabinet for one or two portable fire extinguishers, keeping the units clean, visible and shielded from damage and tampering while allowing rapid access in an emergency. Available in break-glass or clear-view door styles for indoor and semi-protected locations.

techFeatures.label: Purpose
techFeatures.value: Portable fire extinguisher housing (per NFPA 10 accessibility)

techFeatures.label: Capacity
techFeatures.value: Single or double extinguisher (up to 6-12 kg units)

techFeatures.label: Door
techFeatures.value: Glazed / break-glass or acrylic view panel, lockable

techFeatures.label: Typical Size (W x H x D)

items.name: Synthetic Hose
items.overview: A lightweight lay-flat synthetic firefighting delivery hose manufactured to BS EN 14540, comprising a woven polyester (synthetic) reinforcement jacket bonded to a seamless elastomeric lining. It is used with landing valves and pumps for high-pressure fire-brigade delivery and is supplied with instantaneous or Storz couplings.

items.name: Fire Hose Reel
items.overview: A fixed or swinging fire hose reel conforming to BS EN 671-1, fitted with semi-rigid rubber hose permanently connected to the water supply for immediate occupant use. The reel rotates on the water inlet so the full hose length can be deployed without kinking, and the shut-off nozzle provides jet or spray discharge.

items.name: Branch Pipe
items.overview: A firefighting branch pipe (nozzle) to BS 336 that connects to the delivery hose via an instantaneous coupling and shapes the water stream into a jet or diffused spray. Manufactured in light alloy or brass, it is available in fixed-diameter and combination jet/spray patterns for hose reels and rack-hose stations.

techFeatures.label: Type
techFeatures.value: Jet, spray or combination branch pipe

items.name: Landing Valve
items.overview: The Landing Valve is a BS 5041 rising-main (wet or dry riser) outlet valve used to draw water at each floor level for firefighting. Available in oblique (angle) or right-angle pattern, it is manufactured from gunmetal/bronze or ductile iron with a 2-1/2" male instantaneous outlet to BS 336. A screw-down spindle with hand wheel controls flow, and a blank cap with chain protects the outlet.

techFeatures.label: Accessories
techFeatures.value: Blank cap with chain; optional pressure-restricting orifice

items.name: Angle Valve
items.overview: The Angle Valve is a 45° or right-angle hose (rack) valve used at hose-station and standpipe outlets to supply fire hose lines. Cast from durable brass or bronze, it provides a female NPT inlet and a male hose-thread (NST/NH) outlet for direct hose or hose-rack connection. It is UL Listed / FM Approved for Class I, II and III standpipe systems.

items.name: Pressure Restricting Valve
items.overview: The Pressure Restricting Valve (PRV) is a 2-1/2" hose angle valve fitted with an adjustable stem and bonnet that limits discharge pressure at standpipe hose outlets, per NFPA 14. Field-adjustable settings allow the installer to restrict residual pressure to a level manageable by responders, while trained personnel can override the restriction by removing the locking pin. It is UL Listed and FM Approved in cast brass.

techFeatures.label: Override
techFeatures.value: Removable locking pin for full-open by trained personnel

items.name: Breeching Connection
items.overview: The Breeching Connection (dry-riser / fire brigade inlet) is a BS 5041 Part 3 assembly that lets the fire service charge a building's rising main from pumping appliances. Supplied in 2-way or 4-way form, it comprises 2-1/2" male instantaneous inlets to BS 336, each with an integral non-return valve, plus a drain valve and a flanged outlet to the riser. Gunmetal construction ensures corrosion resistance for external installation.

items.name: Siamese Connection
items.overview: The Siamese Connection is a fire department connection (FDC) that provides the fire service with two or more inlets to boost water into a sprinkler or standpipe system. Available as a freestanding (sidewalk) or wall-mounted unit, the standard 4" x 2-1/2" x 2-1/2" configuration uses a double-clapper body so a single hose line can supply the system independently. It is built in cast brass or ductile iron and is UL Listed / FM Approved per NFPA 13/14.

techFeatures.label: Inlets
techFeatures.value: 2 x 2-1/2" Male NST swivel with caps & chains

items.name: Seamless Pipes
items.overview: Seamless steel pipe is manufactured without a welded seam by piercing and drawing solid billets, giving uniform strength and pressure capability for fire-protection mains, risers and high-pressure branch lines. It is supplied to ASTM A106 / A53 Grade B in Schedule 40 and Schedule 80 wall thicknesses, in black or galvanized finish.

techFeatures.label: Standard
techFeatures.value: ASTM A106 Gr.B / ASTM A53 Gr.B seamless

techFeatures.label: Application
techFeatures.value: Fire mains, risers, high-pressure branch lines per NFPA 13

techFeatures.label: Listings
techFeatures.value: Manufactured to ASTM; used in UL/FM systems

items.name: ERW Pipes
items.overview: Electric-resistance-welded (ERW) steel pipe is formed from steel strip and welded along a longitudinal seam, offering an economical option for fire-protection distribution and branch piping. It is produced to ASTM A53 Gr.B and ASTM A795 in Schedule 10 and Schedule 40, groovable, and typically supplied red-painted or galvanized for sprinkler service.

techFeatures.label: Standard
techFeatures.value: ASTM A53 Gr.B / ASTM A795 ERW

techFeatures.label: Finish
techFeatures.value: Red oxide painted or hot-dip galvanized

techFeatures.label: Application
techFeatures.value: Sprinkler distribution & branch lines per NFPA 13

techFeatures.label: Listings
techFeatures.value: UL Listed / FM Approved for fire sprinkler pipe

items.name: Grooved Fittings
items.overview: Grooved mechanical fittings and couplings join grooved-end pipe using a ductile-iron housing and gasket clamped over the pipe grooves, providing a fast, flexible and reliable connection for fire-protection piping. Housings are cast from ductile iron to ASTM A536 and are UL listed and FM approved with working pressures up to 300 psi.

techFeatures.label: Standard
techFeatures.value: ASTM A536 ductile iron / AWWA C606 groove

techFeatures.label: Gasket Material
techFeatures.value: EPDM (Grade E) for wet/dry sprinkler service

items.name: Threaded Fitting
items.overview: Threaded pipe fittings provide screwed connections for small-diameter fire-protection and general piping, using tapered NPT threads to join pipe, valves and devices. They are produced from malleable or ductile iron to ASME B16.3 in Class 150 and Class 300 pressure ratings, supplied black or hot-dip galvanized.

techFeatures.label: Fitting Type
techFeatures.value: Elbows, tees, couplings, unions, caps, plugs, bushings

techFeatures.label: Material
techFeatures.value: Malleable iron (ASTM A197) or ductile iron (ASTM A536)

techFeatures.label: Listings
techFeatures.value: Manufactured to ASME; UL/FM listed types available

items.name: FM-200
items.overview: An FM-200 (HFC-227ea) clean-agent total-flooding fire suppression system designed and installed to NFPA 2001. The colourless, electrically non-conductive agent is stored liquefied under nitrogen super-pressurisation and discharges rapidly to extinguish fire by heat absorption, leaving no residue - ideal for server rooms, data centres, electrical switchgear and archives.

techFeatures.label: Applications
techFeatures.value: Data centres, server & control rooms, switchgear, archives

items.name: CO2 Systems
items.overview: A carbon-dioxide fire suppression system designed to NFPA 12 for total-flooding or local-application protection. CO2 extinguishes fire by reducing the oxygen concentration and providing a cooling effect, leaving no residue. Available in high-pressure (cylinder bank) and low-pressure (refrigerated bulk tank) configurations for machinery, generators, flammable-liquid and electrical hazards.

techFeatures.label: Hazard Warning
techFeatures.value: Design concentrations are lethal - occupied areas require pre-discharge alarm & delay

techFeatures.label: Applications
techFeatures.value: Generators, turbines, flammable liquids, electrical rooms, printing presses

items.name: Foam Systems
items.overview: A low-, medium- or high-expansion foam fire suppression system designed to NFPA 11 for flammable and combustible liquid hazards. Foam concentrate is proportioned into the water stream - commonly via a bladder tank proportioner - and aerated to form a blanket that suppresses vapour and extinguishes by smothering and cooling. Available with AFFF and alcohol-resistant AR-AFFF concentrates.

techFeatures.label: Proportioning Method
techFeatures.value: Bladder tank, inline inductor or balanced-pressure pump

techFeatures.label: Discharge Devices
techFeatures.value: Foam chambers, monitors, sprinklers, hi-ex generators

techFeatures.label: Applications
techFeatures.value: Fuel storage tanks, dikes, loading racks, hangars, warehouses

items.name: Kitchen Hood Suppression
items.overview: A pre-engineered wet-chemical fire suppression system listed to UL 300 for commercial cooking operations. Nozzles positioned within the hood, plenum, duct and over cooking appliances discharge a potassium-based agent that saponifies hot cooking oils to form a vapour-sealing blanket, providing both automatic (fusible-link) and manual pull-station actuation with gas/electric shut-off.

techFeatures.label: Coverage
techFeatures.value: Cooking appliances, hood plenum, exhaust duct

techFeatures.label: Applications
techFeatures.value: Commercial kitchens - fryers, ranges, griddles, woks, char-broilers

items.name: Aerosol System
items.overview: A condensed aerosol fire suppression system that generates an ultra-fine potassium-based aerosol on activation to extinguish fire by interrupting the flame's chemical chain reaction. Stored non-pressurised in compact generators, it requires no piping, cylinders or vessel storage, making it a clean, low-maintenance and environmentally friendly solution for enclosed hazards.

techFeatures.label: Infrastructure
techFeatures.value: No cylinders, piping or nozzle network required

techFeatures.label: Electrical Non-Conductivity
techFeatures.value: Suitable for energised electrical enclosures (per listing)

techFeatures.label: Applications
techFeatures.value: Electrical cabinets, switchrooms, engine compartments, small enclosed spaces

featured.name: Fire Pump Set
featured.overview: PEDJ series fire pump set consists of an Electric pump + Diesel pump + Jockey pump and all accessories. The pressure switch and control cabinet automatically turn the three pumps on/off — the electric pump and jockey pump operate when there is electricity, and the diesel pump activates when the power cuts. Built to the NFPA20 standard.

techFeatures.label: Configuration
techFeatures.value: Electric Pump + Diesel Pump + Jockey Pump

featured.name: Upright sprinkler
featured.overview: The upright automatic sprinkler is installed with its deflector above the pipe, directing water downward and outward to distribute it evenly over the protected area. It is intended for use in exposed-pipe systems and areas where pendent installation is impractical, and is listed to UL 199 for use in NFPA 13 wet, dry and preaction systems.

techFeatures.label: Response Type
techFeatures.value: Standard response 5 mm bulb / Quick response 3 mm bulb

techFeatures.label: Temperature Ratings
techFeatures.value: 57 C orange, 68 C red, 79 C yellow, 93 C green, 141 C blue

featured.name: OS&Y Valve Flanged
featured.overview: The APC Industrie Z-300 is a 300 PSI OS&Y gate valve certified by UL/cUL, FM, VDS, CCC, and NSF/ANSI 61 & 372. Built to ANSI/AWWA C515 and ASME B16.10, it features a ductile iron body and EPDM-encapsulated wedge for zero-leakage, bi-directional sealing. With a debris-free, straight-through design, it has passed 5,000+ seat cycling tests. Features like a pre-grooved stainless steel stem and tamper-resistant nuts allow easy switch installation. Every valve is 100% tested for zero-leakage, reliable performance.

techFeatures.label: Flange Standard
techFeatures.value: ASME/ANSI B 16.1 Class 125, ASME/ANSI B 16.42 Class 150, BS EN 1092-2 PN 16, GB / T9113.1

techFeatures.label: Approvals
techFeatures.value: UL, cUL, FM, NSF / ANSI 61 & NSF / ANSI 372, VDS, CCC

techFeatures.label: Body Plug
techFeatures.value: NPT plug on body with 2 operating nuts

techFeatures.label: Lead-Free Certification
techFeatures.value: Certified lead-free by NSF / ANSI 61 & NSF / ANSI 372 is available

materials.name: Flat Washer
materials.standard: Flat Washer / Stainless Steel 304 / ASTM A276

featured.name: Flow switch
featured.overview: The vane-type waterflow alarm switch mounts on the sprinkler branch or riser and detects flow of water in the pipe, actuating electrical contacts to signal a fire alarm or supervisory panel. A pneumatic retard element delays the alarm to prevent false signals from pressure surges, and the device is UL/FM listed for use per NFPA 13 and NFPA 72.

featured.name: dry barrel hydrant
featured.overview: The Dry Barrel Hydrant is an AWWA C502 dry-barrel fire hydrant designed for regions subject to freezing temperatures. The main valve seats below the frost line, and positive-acting drain valves empty the barrel automatically each time the hydrant is closed, preventing water from freezing inside the standpipe. Rugged ductile iron construction and a break-away flange provide reliable, traffic-resistant service.

techFeatures.label: Outlet Threads
techFeatures.value: NH/NST (4.5-4 NH & 2.5-7.5 NH) or to order

techFeatures.label: Coating
techFeatures.value: Red epoxy exterior; bitumen-coated below grade

featured.name: Single Fire Hose Cabinet FHC-Class1&2
featured.overview: A single-door fire hose cabinet designed to house a Class I and/or Class II standpipe outlet in accordance with NFPA 14. It stores a landing valve, hose rack with rack hose and nozzle, providing a code-compliant, protected point of connection for both fire-brigade and occupant first-aid firefighting use.

techFeatures.label: Typical Contents
techFeatures.value: Landing valve, hose rack, 1.5"/2.5" rack hose, nozzle

techFeatures.label: Typical Size (W x H x D)

featured.name: Breeching Connection
featured.overview: The Breeching Connection (dry-riser / fire brigade inlet) is a BS 5041 Part 3 assembly that lets the fire service charge a building's rising main from pumping appliances. Supplied in 2-way or 4-way form, it comprises 2-1/2" male instantaneous inlets to BS 336, each with an integral non-return valve, plus a drain valve and a flanged outlet to the riser. Gunmetal construction ensures corrosion resistance for external installation.

featured.name: Seamless Pipes
featured.overview: Seamless steel pipe is manufactured without a welded seam by piercing and drawing solid billets, giving uniform strength and pressure capability for fire-protection mains, risers and high-pressure branch lines. It is supplied to ASTM A106 / A53 Grade B in Schedule 40 and Schedule 80 wall thicknesses, in black or galvanized finish.

techFeatures.label: Standard
techFeatures.value: ASTM A106 Gr.B / ASTM A53 Gr.B seamless

techFeatures.label: Application
techFeatures.value: Fire mains, risers, high-pressure branch lines per NFPA 13

techFeatures.label: Listings
techFeatures.value: Manufactured to ASTM; used in UL/FM systems

featured.name: Threaded Fitting
featured.overview: Threaded pipe fittings provide screwed connections for small-diameter fire-protection and general piping, using tapered NPT threads to join pipe, valves and devices. They are produced from malleable or ductile iron to ASME B16.3 in Class 150 and Class 300 pressure ratings, supplied black or hot-dip galvanized.

techFeatures.label: Fitting Type
techFeatures.value: Elbows, tees, couplings, unions, caps, plugs, bushings

techFeatures.label: Material
techFeatures.value: Malleable iron (ASTM A197) or ductile iron (ASTM A536)

techFeatures.label: Listings
techFeatures.value: Manufactured to ASME; UL/FM listed types available

featured.name: FM-200
featured.overview: An FM-200 (HFC-227ea) clean-agent total-flooding fire suppression system designed and installed to NFPA 2001. The colourless, electrically non-conductive agent is stored liquefied under nitrogen super-pressurisation and discharges rapidly to extinguish fire by heat absorption, leaving no residue - ideal for server rooms, data centres, electrical switchgear and archives.

techFeatures.label: Applications
techFeatures.value: Data centres, server & control rooms, switchgear, archives

featured.name: CO2 Systems
featured.overview: A carbon-dioxide fire suppression system designed to NFPA 12 for total-flooding or local-application protection. CO2 extinguishes fire by reducing the oxygen concentration and providing a cooling effect, leaving no residue. Available in high-pressure (cylinder bank) and low-pressure (refrigerated bulk tank) configurations for machinery, generators, flammable-liquid and electrical hazards.

techFeatures.label: Hazard Warning
techFeatures.value: Design concentrations are lethal - occupied areas require pre-discharge alarm & delay

techFeatures.label: Applications
techFeatures.value: Generators, turbines, flammable liquids, electrical rooms, printing presses

featured.name: Foam Systems
featured.overview: A low-, medium- or high-expansion foam fire suppression system designed to NFPA 11 for flammable and combustible liquid hazards. Foam concentrate is proportioned into the water stream - commonly via a bladder tank proportioner - and aerated to form a blanket that suppresses vapour and extinguishes by smothering and cooling. Available with AFFF and alcohol-resistant AR-AFFF concentrates.

techFeatures.label: Proportioning Method
techFeatures.value: Bladder tank, inline inductor or balanced-pressure pump

techFeatures.label: Discharge Devices
techFeatures.value: Foam chambers, monitors, sprinklers, hi-ex generators

techFeatures.label: Applications
techFeatures.value: Fuel storage tanks, dikes, loading racks, hangars, warehouses

featured.name: Kitchen Hood Suppression
featured.overview: A pre-engineered wet-chemical fire suppression system listed to UL 300 for commercial cooking operations. Nozzles positioned within the hood, plenum, duct and over cooking appliances discharge a potassium-based agent that saponifies hot cooking oils to form a vapour-sealing blanket, providing both automatic (fusible-link) and manual pull-station actuation with gas/electric shut-off.

techFeatures.label: Coverage
techFeatures.value: Cooking appliances, hood plenum, exhaust duct

techFeatures.label: Applications
techFeatures.value: Commercial kitchens - fryers, ranges, griddles, woks, char-broilers

featured.name: Aerosol system
featured.overview: A condensed aerosol fire suppression system that generates an ultra-fine potassium-based aerosol on activation to extinguish fire by interrupting the flame's chemical chain reaction. Stored non-pressurised in compact generators, it requires no piping, cylinders or vessel storage, making it a clean, low-maintenance and environmentally friendly solution for enclosed hazards.

techFeatures.label: Infrastructure
techFeatures.value: No cylinders, piping or nozzle network required

techFeatures.label: Electrical Non-Conductivity
techFeatures.value: Suitable for energised electrical enclosures (per listing)

techFeatures.label: Applications
techFeatures.value: Electrical cabinets, switchrooms, engine compartments, small enclosed spaces

groups.title: Fire Alarm Brands
groups.desc: Certified fire detection & alarm systems from the leading global manufacturers we supply and install.

featured.name: Simplex
featured.overview: Simplex delivers addressable and conventional fire detection and life-safety systems for commercial and industrial buildings, supplied and installed by SES.

featured.name: Apollo
featured.overview: Apollo is a leading global manufacturer of fire detection devices. SES supplies and installs the full Apollo range — detectors, control panels, manual call points and notification devices.

featured.name: Notifier
featured.overview: Notifier by Honeywell — intelligent addressable fire alarm and detection systems for commercial and industrial facilities, supplied and installed by SES.

groups.title: Valves
groups.desc: Isolation, check, air release and special valves for water distribution and control.

items.name: Gate Valve
items.overview: Resilient-seated wedge gate valve for potable water distribution and utility networks, designed to EN 1171 with a full-bore, unobstructed waterway and a fully rubber-encapsulated ductile-iron wedge for drop-tight, bidirectional shut-off. The non-rising stem and fusion-bonded epoxy coating make it well suited to buried and chamber installations at PN10/PN16.

techFeatures.label: Wedge
techFeatures.value: Ductile Iron fully vulcanised with EPDM / NBR

items.name: Butterfly Valve
items.overview: Centric (concentric) resilient-lined butterfly valve to EN 593 for isolation and regulation duty in water distribution networks, available in wafer and lug body styles. A one-piece EPDM liner provides the seat and flange gasket in a single element for bubble-tight bidirectional sealing, with manual gear operation for larger sizes.

techFeatures.label: Disc
techFeatures.value: Stainless Steel / Aluminium Bronze / DI Nylon-coated

techFeatures.label: Connection
techFeatures.value: Wafer or Lugged, EN 1092-2 flange compatible

techFeatures.label: Medium
techFeatures.value: Potable water, cooling water, treated effluent

items.name: Swing Check Valve
items.overview: Flanged swing check (non-return) valve to EN 12334 for water distribution and pumping systems, using a single hinged disc that opens with forward flow and closes under gravity and reverse pressure to prevent backflow. The ductile-iron body and resilient disc facing provide reliable, drop-tight sealing with low head loss.

items.name: Double-Ball Air Release Valve
items.overview: Double-orifice combination air valve for water transmission and distribution pipelines, combining a large kinetic orifice for bulk air discharge during filling and air intake during draining with a small automatic orifice that releases accumulated air under working pressure. The double-ball float mechanism ensures reliable sealing across the full operating range at PN16.

techFeatures.label: Function
techFeatures.value: Kinetic (large orifice) + automatic (small orifice) air release/intake

items.name: Float Valve
items.overview: Hydraulically or mechanically actuated float / altitude valve for automatic level control in reservoirs, service tanks and elevated storage, modulating or shutting off inflow as the set water level is reached to prevent overflow. Constructed with a ductile-iron body and resilient seat for tight closure at PN10/PN16.

techFeatures.label: Type
techFeatures.value: Float / altitude level-control valve (modulating or on-off)

techFeatures.label: Design Base
techFeatures.value: Diaphragm/piston hydraulic control valve, EN 1074-5 principle

items.name: Y-Strainer
items.overview: Y-type (Y-pattern) strainer for pipeline protection in water networks, capturing debris and particulates ahead of pumps, valves, meters and control equipment. The angled ductile-iron body houses a removable stainless-steel perforated or mesh screen that is easily withdrawn for cleaning without removing the body from the line, rated to PN16.

techFeatures.label: Medium
techFeatures.value: Potable water, raw water, treated effluent

groups.title: Ductile Iron Fittings
groups.desc: Full range of ductile iron flanged fittings — flanges, bends, tees, tapers, spigots, sockets and specials — to EN 545 / ISO 2531 for water distribution networks.

items.name: PN10 Flange
items.overview: Ductile iron blank/plate flange for PN10 flanged water-network joints. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: PN16 Flange
items.overview: Ductile iron blank/plate flange for PN16 flanged water-network joints. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Neck Flange
items.overview: Ductile iron neck (weld/screw) flange for connecting flanged pipework. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Duckfoot Bend 90°
items.overview: Ductile iron 90° duckfoot bend with integral base for supported risers. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Flanged Bend 11.25°
items.overview: Ductile iron 11.25° flanged bend for directional changes in flanged water pipelines. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Flanged Bend 22.5°
items.overview: Ductile iron 22.5° flanged bend for directional changes in flanged water pipelines. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Flanged Bend 45°
items.overview: Ductile iron 45° flanged bend for directional changes in flanged water pipelines. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Flanged Bend 90°
items.overview: Ductile iron 90° flanged bend for directional changes in flanged water pipelines. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Double Bend 11.25°
items.overview: Ductile iron 11.25° double-flanged bend for directional changes in flanged water pipelines. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Double Bend 22.5°
items.overview: Ductile iron 22.5° double-flanged bend for directional changes in flanged water pipelines. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Double Bend 45°
items.overview: Ductile iron 45° double-flanged bend for directional changes in flanged water pipelines. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Double Bend 90°
items.overview: Ductile iron 90° double-flanged bend for directional changes in flanged water pipelines. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Flanged Tee
items.overview: Ductile iron flanged tee for branch connections on water mains. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Double Flanged Taper
items.overview: Ductile iron double-flanged taper (reducer) to change pipe diameter. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Flanged Spigot
items.overview: Ductile iron flange-spigot adaptor joining flanged and socket/spigot pipe. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Flanged Socket
items.overview: Ductile iron flange-socket adaptor for push-fit to flanged transitions. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Flanged Bell Mouth
items.overview: Ductile iron flanged bell-mouth for smooth intake/outfall flow. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Double Flanged Puddle Pipe
items.overview: Double-flanged pipe with puddle flange for cast-in wall/tank penetrations. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Flanged Pipe
items.overview: Ductile iron double-flanged pipe spool for flanged pipeline runs. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

items.name: Dismantling Joint
items.overview: Adjustable flanged dismantling joint for easy valve/meter removal and installation. Manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531 in ductile iron with fusion-bonded epoxy coating.

groups.title: Manhole Covers
groups.desc: Ductile iron manhole covers and frames for infrastructure and drainage.

items.name: Manhole Covers
items.overview: Ductile iron manhole cover and frame assemblies to EN 124 for access to buried water, drainage and utility chambers, available in round and square formats across load classes A15 to E600. The ductile-iron construction offers high strength at reduced weight, with anti-tilt hinging and lockable options for secure, rattle-free installation in carriageways and pedestrian areas.

techFeatures.label: Bedding
techFeatures.value: Frame depth to suit chamber (100 mm typical)

techFeatures.label: Marking
techFeatures.value: Class marking cast on cover per EN 124

featured.overview: Resilient-seated wedge gate valve for potable water distribution and utility networks, designed to EN 1171 with a full-bore, unobstructed waterway and a fully rubber-encapsulated ductile-iron wedge for drop-tight, bidirectional shut-off. featured.name: Ductile Iron Fitting
featured.overview: Ductile iron pipe fittings for potable water and utility distribution manufactured to EN 545 / ISO 2531, covering the full range of bends, tees, tapers, collars and socket/spigot components for push-in and flanged systems. Cement-mortar lining or fusion-bonded epoxy coating provides corrosion protection for buried service at PN10 through PN25.

techFeatures.label: Range
techFeatures.value: Bends (11/22/45/90), tees, tapers, sockets, spigots, collars, caps

featured.overview: Ductile iron manhole cover and frame assemblies to EN 124 for access to buried water, drainage and utility chambers, available in round and square formats across load classes A15 to E600.
